  • Uses of SeparationDuty in neqsim.process.synthesis

    Methods in neqsim.process.synthesis with parameters of type SeparationDuty
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private FlowsheetProposal
    FlowsheetSynthesisEngine.buildDistillation(SeparationDuty duty, SystemInterface flashed, double opP, List<String> alternatives, String rationale)
    Builds (but does not run) a distillation flowsheet sized from a Fenske estimate.
    private FlowsheetProposal
    FlowsheetSynthesisEngine.buildFallback(SeparationDuty duty, String reason, double opP)
    Falls back to a single-stage flash when the main flow fails.
    private ProcessSystem
    FlowsheetSynthesisEngine.buildSingleFlash(SeparationDuty duty, double opP)
    Builds and runs a single-flash flowsheet.
    private FlowsheetSynthesisEngine.KeyComponents
    FlowsheetSynthesisEngine.identifyKeys(SeparationDuty duty, SystemInterface flashed)
    Identifies the light and heavy keys from the duty specs and the flash result.
    private String
    FlowsheetSynthesisEngine.pickComplementKey(SeparationDuty duty, SystemInterface flashed, String exclude, boolean wantHighestK)
     
    FlowsheetProposal
    FlowsheetSynthesisEngine.proposeAndBuild(SeparationDuty duty)
    Builds and returns a FlowsheetProposal for the given duty.
    private boolean
    FlowsheetSynthesisEngine.specsMet(SeparationDuty duty, Map<String,Double> gasFracs, Map<String,Double> liqFracs)
    Tests whether predicted mole fractions satisfy the duty specs.
